name: baseline
description: Benign trace of the test target running without any manipulation. The ping no-op holds the observation window open long enough for the ETW session to capture steady-state activity; the cooldown gives the telemetry process time to flush its write buffer before being stopped.

extra.notes: No DLL injection. ping -n 6 127.0.0.1 is a no-op that keeps the process alive for ~5 seconds. The 5-second cooldown ensures the telemetry process flushes its buffer before Stop-Process kills it.
